raw_title: Henry F Saamoi: Keynote address - "Opening Ceremony of the Meetings of the College of Supervisors of the West Africa Monetary Zone"
raw_content: Keynote address by Mr Henry F Saamoi, Executive Governor of the Central Bank of Liberia, at the Opening Ceremony of the Meetings of the College of Supervisors of the West Africa Monetary Zone (CSWAMZ), Monrovia, 4 February 2026.
